news.t: Dow-linked ETFs lower one day after overhaul announcement

holdings.infoBox: DJD is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Verizon Communications stock at 9.13%, UnitedHealth Group at 7.56%, Chevron at 6.28%, Cisco Systems at 5.68%, and International Business Machines at 5.34%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dow Jones Industrial Average Dividend ETF (DJD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund follows an index comprising dividend-paying securities of the companies listed on the Dow Jones Industrial Average, weighted by yield. DJD was launched on Dec 16, 2015 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Dow Jones Industrial Average Yield Weighted Index

data.title: Dow-linked ETFs lower one day after overhaul announcement
data.text: Dow-linked ETFs lower one day after overhaul announcement Exchange-traded funds tracking the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, -0.47% turned in a mixed performance one day after a big shakeup to the ...
